constants.label: BPR effective date
constants.note: Must always include qualifier: 'subject to final enactment'

constants.label: VCT income tax relief rate
constants.note: Post-2025 Budget. NOT 30%. Known bug in app spec — must be corrected before developer handoff.

constants.label: Pension IHT change date
constants.note: Must always include qualifier: 'subject to final enactment'. Not yet enacted as of April 2026.

constants.label: Decumulation Planner status
constants.note: This exact wording required. Do not describe as live or available.

constants.label: Unlock Access framework
constants.value: Structured disclosure — not scoring, evaluation, or investment advice
constants.note: Absence from platform is the filter. Failed companies do not appear. Never frame as scoring or advice.

constants.label: Product tagline
constants.note: Approved and registered in Content Bank. Use exactly.

constants.label: EIS income tax relief rate
constants.note: Enterprise Investment Scheme. Up to 30% income tax relief on investments up to £1M (£2M if at least £1M in knowledge-intensive companies).

constants.label: EIS CGT deferral rate
constants.note: Capital gains tax deferral available on gains reinvested into EIS-qualifying companies. No cap on amount.

constants.label: SEIS income tax relief rate
constants.note: Seed Enterprise Investment Scheme. 50% income tax relief on investments up to the annual SEIS limit.

constants.label: Loss relief rate
constants.value: Up to effective 38.5% for EIS (after income tax relief), up to 72% for SEIS
constants.note: Calculated as: (investment - income tax relief) × marginal tax rate. Exact rate depends on investor's marginal rate.

constants.label: Platform pricing — NEVER publish
constants.note: Platform pricing must NEVER appear in any investor-facing document. Founding investors receive lifetime premium access at no cost — this CAN be stated.

constants.label: EIS maximum effective loss per pound (additional rate)
constants.note: 30% income tax relief upfront, then 45% loss relief on remaining 70p. Always include: subject to individual tax circumstances.

constants.label: SEIS maximum effective loss per pound (additional rate)
constants.note: 50% income tax relief upfront, then 45% loss relief on remaining 50p. Always include: subject to individual tax circumstances.

constants.label: PROHIBITED — wrong SEIS loss relief figure
constants.note: 22p per pound is WRONG. The correct figure is 27.5p per pound for additional rate taxpayers. Any reference to 22p must be flagged as a compliance failure.
